boxes.name: kind
boxes.label: Kind
boxes.description: frame · nav · button · input · text · image · list · section

boxes.name: note
boxes.label: Note
boxes.description: Detail / intent behind this block — Claude reads this.

boxes.name: boundTable
boxes.label: Bound table
boxes.description: Which data table this element shows / writes — the connection from screen to data.

boxes.name: z
boxes.label: Stack order
boxes.description: Paint/stack order; higher sits on top. Set by Bring forward / Send back.

brief.name: type
brief.label: Request type
brief.description: new (build a new applet) or change (modify an existing one)

brief.name: target
brief.label: Target app
brief.description: If a change: which app (name or id).

brief.name: summary
brief.label: Summary
brief.description: In a sentence or two: what you want and why.

features.name: target
features.label: Where
features.description: Which screen / block / area it relates to.

data_model.name: fields
data_model.label: Fields (summary)
data_model.description: Quick summary, e.g. name, email, joined date. Add typed fields below for the real schema.

model_fields.name: table
model_fields.label: Table
model_fields.description: Which data table this field belongs to.

model_fields.name: type
model_fields.label: Type
model_fields.description: text · number · date · yes/no · a choice list · a link to another table

model_fields.name: options
model_fields.label: Options / link
model_fields.description: For 'choice': allowed values (comma-separated). For 'link': the table it points to.

wires.name: element
wires.label: Element
wires.description: Which wireframe block this behavior belongs to (e.g. the Add button).

wires.name: behavior
wires.label: Does what
wires.description: The backend action this element performs when used.

wires.name: table
wires.label: On table
wires.description: Which data table the action runs on.

wires.name: field
wires.label: Field
wires.description: For 'writes a field' / 'filters': which field it sets or filters by.

wires.name: value
wires.label: Value
wires.description: For 'writes a field' / 'filters the list': the value to set or to filter by.

wires.name: screen
wires.label: Target screen
wires.description: For 'opens a screen': which screen (frame label) to open — or just draw an arrow from this element to a frame.

wires.name: note
wires.label: Note
wires.description: Detail behind this behavior — Claude reads this.
